notes: The skill improves both discriminating evals: it turns the goroutine review from a text-only recommendation into a concrete cancellation-aware code fix, and it more clearly labels business identifiers in context as misuse.
The struct-storage eval is non-discriminating in this first round because baseline behavior was already strong on that pattern.
Timing and token metrics were not captured from the executor notifications in this run, so benchmark time and token values are zeroed and should not be interpreted.
